important_notes.do_not_copy: CRITICAL: These are STRUCTURAL patterns to learn from, NOT content to copy verbatim
important_notes.usage: Study the STRUCTURE and APPROACH, then generate FRESH content for each user
important_notes.warning: Copying these examples defeats the purpose - use them to understand patterns only

transformation_patterns.example: I went from R750/month to R8,333/month in 18 months by pitching partnerships not posts

components.before_state: Specific, relatable starting point with number
components.after_state: Aspirational but believable end point with number
components.timeframe: Realistic duration that shows it's achievable

contrarian_truth.structure: Stop doing [Common Advice]. Start doing [Opposite Approach]. Here's why...
contrarian_truth.example: Stop creating content. Start creating cash flow. Here's the difference...

components.common_advice: What everyone is being told to do

contrarian_truth.learn_from_this: Challenges assumptions + Offers alternative + Promises proof

mistake_revelation.structure: You're [doing X] because you think [assumption]. But [reality]. Here's what actually works...
mistake_revelation.example: You're accepting R500 posts because you think you need 100K followers. But brands care about engagement rate, not follower count.
mistake_revelation.learn_from_this: Identifies mistake without attacking person + Explains why mistake made + Offers solution

origin_story.structure: [Shame/Fear] drove me to [desperate action]. [Unexpected result]. Now [transformation].
origin_story.example: Family shame drove me to quit my job without backup. Lost R15K. Learned partnerships beat posts. Now R100K/month helping creators.

components.emotional_driver: What pushed them to act (Shadow Fear)

origin_story.learn_from_this: Vulnerability + Risk + Failure + Learning + Transformation = Relatable authority

question_hook.example: Why are you accepting R500 posts when your engagement is worth R5,000?
question_hook.learn_from_this: Challenges their current reality + Shows gap between current and possible

statement_hook.example: Your follower count doesn't matter. Your pitch structure does. Here's the 3-email system.
statement_hook.learn_from_this: Bold claim + Why it matters + What they'll learn

story_hook.structure: I [past state]. Now I [current state]. By [unexpected method].
story_hook.example: I used to beg for R750 collabs. Now brands pitch me R50K deals. By changing one email.
